title: Poster Boys
subTitle: Three men face ridicule from their families and fellow villagers after they appear on a poster that promotes vasectomies. They soon embark on a mission to prove that they are victims of the system.

title: Jodi
subTitle: An accident brings Kapil and Kanchana Mala together, who then begin dating. However, their dream of getting married is interrupted due to disapproval and revenge.

title: Tan- Badan
subTitle: A spoilt young man wants to marry the girl of his dreams, but instead he has to marry an innocent village girl who knows nothing of the intimate relationship between a husband and wife.

subTitle: Bittu, a movie fanatic and student, always talks in Bollywood references. However, this drives his teacher crazy as he always tries to make Bittu studious and excel in his academics.

subTitle: Tinni and Micky fall in love and introduce each other to the respective families. However, after meeting Micky's overbearing family, Tinni contacts a break-up consultant to sabotage the wedding.

subTitle: The bond between two friends, who have been inseparable since their childhood, is affected when they meet a beautiful woman.

title: Jaanu
subTitle: Ram and Jaanu are childhood sweethearts who meet at their school reunion after nearly two decades. Although initially awkward, they soon start recollecting their past and resolve their differences.

title: CID
subTitle: Ishaan gets into a quarrel with safety officer Gyaan, and moments later, an attendant gets shot. Moreover, after a few years, Gyaan is found murdered in a chair in an old mill.

title: CID
